story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0100_10:
I’m sure I have much to learn, so don’t hold
back on critique.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0200_10:
I like your grit! Then without further ado,
let’s begin!
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0300_10:
First, I’d like you to try this role. Get into
character and act out what they’re feeling.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0600_10:
Acting isn’t just about imitating speech
patterns.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0700_10: I see... Acting is indeed difficult to grasp.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0800_10:
I didn’t expect to get it on the first try,
but to be this incompetent...
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_0900_10:
What do you want to do? If you’re gonna
throw in the towel, now’s the time.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1000_10: Your partner seems quite worried about you.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1200_10:
New challenges are fun. We’ll figure it out
together.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1300_10:
Oh-ho. Not a quitter, eh? Color me
impressed.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1400_10: That makes you and Diantha similar.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1600_10:
That child has played many roles in her
acting career, I hear.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1700_10:
Acting is a demanding profession. As we
age, our roles and expectations of us
change too.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1800_10:
But apparently, she’s never considered
that a burden. In fact, she welcomes the
challenge.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_1900_10: Do you think that’s the secret to her strength?
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2000_10:
I suppose so. Pokémon battles are also
constantly changing.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2100_10: She’s strong because she can adapt.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2200_10:
No matter what happens onstage, she enjoys
herself and just rolls with it.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2400_10:
Is that...a good thing? Wouldn’t that change
the story?
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2500_10:
In the world of theater, sticking to the script
isn’t the only way to act.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2600_10:
Some actors are highly respected for their
ability to improvise.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2800_10:
Perhaps you’d be better off putting yourself
into the role, rather than purely acting it out.
story_arceus_10_04000/2401_1001_2900_10:
Take the role you’ve been given and make
it your own!
